items.d: small green or purple food; you eat a lot of them at once
items.s: I had some green ___ with my lunch. They were small and very nice.
items.hintDe: Kleine grüne oder violette Früchte, die in einer Rispe wachsen.

items.d: small purple food with a stone in the middle
items.s: Dad, are there any ___ and peaches in the fridge?
items.hintDe: Violette Früchte mit einem harten Kern in der Mitte.
items.sbRef: WB p.74 ex 14, 'are there any plums and peaches in the fridge?'

items.d: an orange cake that people eat in October
items.s: My grandma makes the best ___ every October.
items.hintDe: Ein oranger Kuchen, den man besonders im Herbst isst.

items.d: a white food cooked in milk that you eat hot after dinner
items.s: We had hot ___ after dinner. It was white.
items.hintDe: Eine weiße Süßspeise, die man mit Milch kocht.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu (desserts) / song p.73 'of rice and cabbage stew'

items.d: a cold brown food that you eat after dinner
items.s: I always have ___ at the restaurant. It is cold and brown.
items.hintDe: Kaltes, braunes Eis mit Schokoladengeschmack.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu (desserts) / song p.73 'I dreamed of ice cream'

items.d: a big farm food that families eat for a holiday dinner
items.s: In America, families eat ___ for a big holiday dinner.
items.hintDe: Ein großer Vogel, den man oft zu einem Festessen isst.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu, 'Turkey with potatoes and cabbage'

items.d: meat from a pig that you eat in a sandwich
items.s: I'd like a ___ and cheese sandwich, please.
items.hintDe: Fleisch vom Schwein, das man gern aufs Brot oder auf die Pizza legt.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'a pizza with ham, cheese and tomatoes'

items.d: a kind of meat that you eat with chips and carrots
items.s: We had ___ with chips and carrots for our main course.
items.hintDe: Fleisch von der Kuh.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu, 'Beef with chips and carrots'

items.d: the white meat that you put in a soup or eat with rice
items.s: Mum is making ___ soup with carrots and rice for lunch.
items.hintDe: Das Fleisch vom Huhn, oder das Tier selbst.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu, 'Chicken with rice and peas'

items.d: a drink that you make with green or red food from a tree
items.s: Can I have a glass of ___, please?
items.hintDe: Ein Saft, den man aus Äpfeln macht.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'An apple juice, please.'

items.d: You eat this white food at the end of dinner, and it is really delicious.
items.s: I had a slice of ___ with strawberries after dinner.
items.hintDe: Ein heller Kuchen, den man mit Topfen oder Frischkäse macht.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu (desserts) / sketch 'cheesecake for dessert'

items.d: food that you eat for breakfast, cooked from eggs
items.s: We had ___ for breakfast this morning.
items.hintDe: Flache Teigfladen aus Eiern und Mehl, oft zum Frühstück.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu (desserts) / song p.73 'I dreamed of pancakes'

items.d: a drink in a bottle that has no sugar
items.s: I'd like a bottle of ___, please.
items.hintDe: Wasser mit kleinen Bläschen, das man in der Flasche kauft.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'Mineral water, please.'

items.d: a red food that you put in a salad or on a pizza
items.s: I'd like a pizza with ham, cheese and red ___.
items.hintDe: Rotes Gemüse, das man oft in den Salat oder auf die Pizza gibt. Plural: tomatoes.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'a pizza with ham, cheese and tomatoes'

items.d: a big green vegetable with many leaves
items.s: We had turkey with potatoes and ___ for our main course.
items.hintDe: Ein großes grünes Gemüse mit vielen Blättern.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu, 'Turkey with potatoes and cabbage'

items.d: long meat that you cook and eat, often for breakfast or dinner
items.s: For me a pizza with ham, ___ and cheese.
items.hintDe: Längliches Fleisch in einer Hülle, das man brät oder grillt.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'a pizza with ham, sausage and cheese'

items.d: the meat from a young sheep
items.s: The woman had the ___ for her main course.
items.hintDe: Das Fleisch von einem jungen Schaf.
items.sbRef: SB p.71 sketch, 'the lamb chops for the main course'

items.d: green food from a tree that you eat after lunch
items.s: Dad, are there any ___ in the fridge? They are green and you eat them.
items.hintDe: Grüne oder gelbe Früchte, die unten breiter sind als oben.
items.sbRef: WB p.74 ex 14, 'There are some grapes and pears.'

items.d: a red or green vegetable that you put on a pizza
items.s: I'd like a pizza with ham, mushrooms and green ___.
items.hintDe: Rotes, grünes oder gelbes Gemüse, das man gern auf die Pizza gibt.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'a pizza with ham, mushrooms and green peppers'

items.d: a white vegetable that makes you cry when you cook it
items.s: I don't want any ___ on my pizza, please.
items.hintDe: Weißes Gemüse, von dem man beim Schneiden weinen muss.
items.sbRef: WB p.78 ex 13A, 'But I don't want any onions.'

items.d: a small green or black food that you put on a pizza or in a salad
items.s: Would you like ___ on your pizza? They are small, green or black.
items.hintDe: Kleine grüne oder schwarze Früchte, oft auf der Pizza oder im Salat.
items.sbRef: WB p.78 ex 13A, 'Would you like olives maybe?'

items.d: a small food that you can put on a pizza or eat with meat
items.s: I'd like a pizza with ham, ___ and green peppers.
items.hintDe: Kleine Pilze, die man auf die Pizza geben oder mit Fleisch essen kann.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'a pizza with ham, mushrooms and green peppers'

items.d: a brown vegetable that you eat hot with butter
items.s: They had turkey with ___ and cabbage.
items.hintDe: Ein braunes Gemüse, das unter der Erde wächst. Plural: potatoes.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu, 'Lamb chops with potatoes and cabbage'

items.d: food from a tree with a stone in the middle, that you eat in summer
items.s: Are there any plums and ___ in the fridge?
items.hintDe: Orange Früchte mit weicher Haut und einem großen Kern.
items.sbRef: WB p.74 ex 14, 'are there any plums and peaches in the fridge?'

items.d: small red food that you eat in summer
items.s: Here, have some red ___.
items.hintDe: Kleine rote Früchte, die man im Sommer isst und zu Marmelade macht.
items.sbRef: WB p.78 ex 7, 'Here, have some strawberries.'

items.d: the man or woman who cooks the food in a restaurant
items.s: The ___ cooked a delicious pizza in the kitchen.
items.hintDe: Die Person, die in der Küche eines Restaurants das Essen kocht.
items.sbRef: SB p.72, 'robot chefs cook the food' / p.78 'A chef is behind a window'

items.d: you read this and then you can make a cake or a soup
items.s: Grandma writes her ___ for chocolate cake so I can make it too.
items.hintDe: Eine Anleitung, die dir zeigt, wie du etwas kochst.
items.sbRef: SB p.78, 'A chef is behind a window holding a recipe.'

items.d: the man or woman who brings your food to your table in a restaurant
items.s: The ___ brings us the menu and some food.
items.hintDe: Die Person, die im Restaurant das Essen an den Tisch bringt.
items.sbRef: SB p.71 sketch, 'I'm your waiter for the evening.'

items.d: a cover for a plate that keeps the food hot in a restaurant
items.s: The waiter put the ___ over my food at the restaurant.
items.hintDe: Eine runde Haube, die der Kellner über den Teller stellt, damit das Essen warm bleibt.
items.sbRef: SB p.78, 'A waiter is carrying a cloche (covered serving dish).'

items.d: you read this and then you order your food in a restaurant
items.s: Can I have the ___, please? I want to order some food.
items.hintDe: Die Karte im Restaurant, auf der steht, was du bestellen kannst.
items.sbRef: SB p.69, 'Read the dialogue' (ordering from the menu) / p.78 'A man is looking at the menu.'

items.d: a piece of bread or cake that is not very big
items.s: Can I have a ___ of your pizza?
items.hintDe: Ein dünnes Stück, das man von Brot, Kuchen oder Pizza abschneidet.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb, 'Can I have a slice of your pizza?'

items.d: a man or woman who is in a play or a show
items.s: My favourite ___ is in a new show this summer.
items.hintDe: Eine Person, die in Filmen oder im Theater spielt.
items.sbRef: SB p.71 sketch, 'I want to be an actor, but I need the money.'

items.d: the food you eat after the starter, like meat or fish with vegetables
items.s: After the soup, we had chicken with rice for the ___.
items.hintDe: Der große Gang beim Essen, den du nach der Vorspeise isst.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu 'MAIN COURSES' / sketch 'Here come the main courses.'

items.d: to make a drink go from a bottle into a glass
items.s: Can you ___ some apple juice into my glass?
items.hintDe: Ein Getränk aus einer Flasche ins Glas gießen.
items.sbRef: SB p.71 sketch, 'Let me pour it for you.'

items.d: a hot food of vegetables or meat that you eat from a plate
items.s: I'd like the onion ___ for starters, please.
items.hintDe: Ein warmes, flüssiges Essen aus Gemüse oder Fleisch.
items.sbRef: SB p.71 sketch, 'Onion soup for starters, please.'

items.d: you eat this small food first, before the chicken or fish
items.s: We had onion soup for ___.
items.hintDe: Der kleine Gang, den du vor dem Hauptgang isst.
items.sbRef: SB p.70 menu 'STARTERS' / sketch 'Onion soup for starters, please.'

items.d: at once, very fast
items.s: Don't wait — bring the soup ___.
items.hintDe: Sofort, ohne zu warten.
items.sbRef: SB p.71 sketch, 'the menu coming straightaway.'

items.d: all of it, with nothing more
items.s: The room was ___ dark.
items.hintDe: Ganz und gar, ohne dass etwas fehlt.
items.sbRef: SB p.72, 'the restaurant is completely dark.'

items.d: a very tall machine that can hold a heavy thing up high
items.s: A big ___ holds the restaurant platform high in the sky.
items.hintDe: Eine sehr hohe Maschine, die schwere Dinge in die Höhe hebt.
items.sbRef: SB p.72, 'A crane holds a large platform more than 50 m above the ground.'

items.d: to not hold a thing well, so it falls down
items.s: Hold the plate well — don't ___ it!
items.hintDe: Etwas aus der Hand fallen lassen.
items.sbRef: SB p.73, 'I dropped my phone. I can't find it.'

items.d: to do a fun show so that people enjoy it and laugh
items.s: The clown dances to ___ the children.
items.hintDe: Etwas Lustiges machen, damit andere Spaß haben.
items.sbRef: SB p.72, 'the robots dance to entertain the guests.'

items.d: you wear these on your eyes when you want to read a book or look at the board
items.s: I need my ___ to read the board at school.
items.hintDe: Zwei Gläser, die man vor den Augen trägt, um besser zu sehen.
items.sbRef: SB p.72, 'The waiters wear special glasses so they can serve the customers.'

items.d: a high place where people can stand on it
items.s: There's a restaurant on a ___ in the sky.
items.hintDe: Eine flache, hohe Fläche, auf der man stehen oder etwas bauen kann.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb, 'There's a restaurant on a platform in the sky.'

items.d: to bring food or drinks to people at a table
items.s: The waiters ___ the food to the guests.
items.hintDe: Jemandem Essen oder Getränke an den Tisch bringen.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.72 'They take you to your table and serve you food.'

items.d: more than two, but not very many
items.s: There are ___ restaurants in my town.
items.hintDe: Mehr als zwei, aber nicht sehr viele.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.72 'an idea that you can find in several cities'

items.d: a hot food of meat and vegetables cooked for a long time
items.s: Can I have the cabbage ___, please?
items.hintDe: Ein warmes Gericht aus Fleisch und Gemüse, das lange zusammen kocht.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / song p.73 'of rice and cabbage stew'

items.d: the cold machine in the kitchen where you keep food
items.s: There's nothing in the ___. Let's go to the supermarket.
items.hintDe: Die kalte Maschine in der Küche, in der du das Essen frisch hältst.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb, 'There's nothing in the fridge. Let's go to the supermarket.'

items.d: to tell people that you are not happy about your food
items.s: The food was cold, so the man wants to ___ to the waiter.
items.hintDe: Sagen, dass man mit etwas nicht zufrieden ist.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.75 'What did the waiter do when Jamie complained?'

items.d: a man or woman who pays money for food at the supermarket
items.s: When you pay money for your food at the supermarket, you are a ___.
items.hintDe: Eine Person, die für Essen oder Dinge Geld bezahlt.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.75 'consumer ... someone who buys something'

items.d: when food or a new thing comes to your door
items.s: I am waiting for my pizza ___.
items.hintDe: Wenn dir etwas Bestelltes nach Hause gebracht wird.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.75 'Your pizza delivery is all wrong.'

items.d: to put new music on your tablet
items.s: Yesterday I ___ the new Dua Lipa music to my tablet.
items.hintDe: Etwas aus dem Internet auf dein Gerät holen.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.75 'I downloaded the new Dua Lipa album.'

items.d: the money you get back when a new thing does not work
items.s: The shoes were too small, so I asked for a ___.
items.hintDe: Das Geld, das du zurückbekommst, wenn etwas nicht in Ordnung ist.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.75 'refund ... to get your money back'

items.d: You really, really think it is true.
items.s: Are you ___ that today is a holiday?
items.hintDe: Ganz sicher; du weißt es genau.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.71 sketch 'Are you certain?'

items.d: to want a new thing now, not the thing from before
items.s: I wanted pizza, but I ___ and asked for pasta after all.
items.hintDe: Sich anders entscheiden als vorher.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb / SB p.76 'I can change my mind' / 'I changed my mind. I want pizza after all.'

items.d: a big room or building where people do exercise
items.s: We play basketball in the school ___ on Fridays.
items.hintDe: Ein großer Raum, in dem man Sport macht.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb, 'Leo goes to the gym.'

items.d: to be too slow and not catch the train
items.s: Hurry up — I don't want to ___ the train!
items.hintDe: Zu spät sein und den Zug oder Bus nicht mehr bekommen.
items.sbRef: Masterlist exampleSb, 'Hurry up, I don't want to miss the bus.'
